_comment: Editable metadata for the dynamic Projects section. Shared by scripts/fetch-github.mjs (build time) and src/data/projects.ts (runtime merge). Projects are ordered newest-first by last-pushed date. BLACKLIST: add a repo name to the 'blacklist' array to stop it ever appearing on the Projects tab (case-insensitive). Keys under 'overrides' are repo names used to keep a curated image/title/tags/link. Add non-GitHub projects (e.g. itch.io games) under 'manual' with a 'date' so they sort into the timeline.

double_top_scanner.title: Double-top Stock Signaller
double_top_scanner.description: Professional stock market scanner that detects bearish reversal patterns across 250+ stocks with email alerts

rateXpose.title: RateXpose
rateXpose.description: A platform that allows users to anonymously share and compare costs for services like auto/home insurance and utility bills.

last_stop_unity3D.title: Last Stop
last_stop_unity3D.description: Unity3D horror game inspired by ps2 low-poly horror. Rated positively with over 6000 downloads

globenews.title: Globe News
globenews.description: 3D visualization with real-time news aggregation. Explore global news by interacting with a 3D Earth model.

opengl_procedural_terrain_generation.title: Procedural Terrain Generation
opengl_procedural_terrain_generation.description: Real-time procedural terrain generation using Perlin noise and light rendering implemented in C++ with OpenGL.

openllm-leaderboard-audit.title: OpenLLM Leaderboard Audit
openllm-leaderboard-audit.description: An audit of the HuggingFace OpenLLM leaderboard rankings

manual.title: Note to Self
manual.description: PSX style indie horror game made for a 10 day game jam. Rated positively with over 200 downloads
